chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2366 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ For hearing of Bail Application 23-11-2023 Mr. Ashique Ali Advocate for the applicant Mr. Altaf Ahmed Sahar, Assistant Attorney General for Federation of Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General for the State Mr. Qaim Deen Director, Commission Afghan Refugee Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. NADRA has confirmed that the Afghan Citizen Card in Abdul Khaliq’s possession is genuine and that his details exist in the NADRA database. Ministry of SAFRON from time to time, increases the period of stay of those who have been issued the Afghan Citizen Card. The Ministry of SAFRON has repeatedly been requested to provide the Court with a clear-cut policy of the Government of Pakistan; however, none has been provided to date. There appears to be a lack of clarity in this regard. Be that as it may, persons who have been allowed to remain lawfully in Pakistan cannot be held behind bars indefinitely due to the apathy of the Government, especially when they have not committed any crime. Abdul Khaliq is admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of a Rs. 2,000 P.R. Bond to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. JUDGE Amjad PS
